Car.MetaTag: Mercedes-Benz GLA 2.1 GLA200d AMG Line (Premium Plus) 7G-DCT 4MATIC Euro 6 (s/s) 5dr Diesel Automatic Black
Car.Description: Available now is this stunning 2017 Mercedes-Benz GLA 200d AMG Line Premium Plus 4MATIC 7G-DCT, a premium compact SUV offering sporty styling, luxurious comfort, and outstanding all-weather capability.
